colab/train_local.py.purpose: Adapted single-GPU Windows training script. Drops Drive mount and inline write_source, imports real dcortex package, local PROJECT_ROOT, local E:\DATA LM corpus tokenizer, bf16+no GradScaler, gradient checkpointing on decoder StandardTransformerBlock, atomic _step_ checkpoints (os.replace, Windows-atomic) with numeric-sort resume + RNG + loss_history, OOM guard, aggregate train_loss series, peak VRAM tracking, run_meta JSON.

verification_gates.ENV: cuda available + capability (12,0) + real cuda matmul

verification_gates.LEARNS: final train loss < initial by >= 15% over 300 steps; report initial/final/min/median/max
verification_gates.RESUME: stop after a checkpoint, restart, resume from correct step with continuous loss

step_30_integration_spine_2026_06_16.claim: Qwen extractor+MiniLM replaces the rule-based parser feeding the sealed symbolic organ; beats the old parser on F1/F3/F5 (it failed at 0/0/0.148) though modest absolute on F1/F3; organ+wrapper clean (wrong_commit 0, no hallucination, no bypass, recall preserved); extractor is the bottleneck. dcortex/+steps/13 byte-identical. MEASURED single machine.

step_31_spine_hardening_2026_06_17.claim: Constrained closed-set attribute classification lifted F1/F3 medians 70->86% / 75->81% over 12 dev/test splits (median clears 80% bar; worst splits 71/67% still below). Bottleneck shifted to entity resolution; value extraction error-free. No regress. dcortex/+steps/13 byte-identical. MEASURED single machine.

step_32_entity_resolution_2026_06_17.claim: Hypothesis refuted: all resolvers statistically tied ~99-100% on the source text (R0/R1/R4 100% median, R2/R3 99.4%, within noise); no resolver meaningfully wins. Heavy Qwen classifier gives no measurable gain and is NOT adopted (parsimony). Real fix was the input (text vs extracted property word): applied to production, F1 86->100%, adversarial 0 leaks. F3 ceiling (86%) is attribute, not entity. MEASURED single machine; dcortex/+steps/13 byte-identical.

step_33_domain_extension_real_facts_2026.type: feasibility/risk campaign (one domain: patents). Expected output = feasibility map, likely PARTIAL, not a PASS.
step_33_domain_extension_real_facts_2026.hard_gate: Part 0 G_VALUE_OPEN - can the sealed organ round-trip OPEN-STRING values (patent_number, filing_date, applicant)? If not, build a value-adapter in integration/ (organ holds a reference token; integration/ holds token->open-string table). Do NOT edit dcortex/ or steps/13.
gates: G_ORGAN_REAL (wrong_commit=0, RoMR, Pas7a on real update)
step_33_domain_extension_real_facts_2026.discipline: no fabrication; every gold triple source-pinned to a real patent; unverifiable fields omitted, not invented.

result.G_VALUE_OPEN: PASS - native open round-trip FALSE (closed-vocab int index, value_idx PRIMARY TRUTH); adapter round-trips via reference token. Confirmed 2 independent sources.

G_EXTRACT_REAL.note: on CLEAN assembled bibliographic text (answer verbatim) - UPPER BOUND, not raw documents; 6 open 'misses' are gold-normalization strictness not model errors

G_ORGAN_REAL.pas7a_update: single-write NOT reflected; needs 3 reinforcements via DISPUTED->NONE_ATTRIBUTE->COMMITTED

result.G_HALLUC: controlled grounded-on-uncovered=0 (6/6 abstain). Raw unconstrained model asserted concrete values 5/6, >=3 verifiably WRONG vs source (applicant W.L.Gore for US4733665A real=Expandable Grafts; date Oct-1957 for LEGO US3005282A real=1958-07-28; date Mar-1997 for US6004596A real=1997-12-08); veto reduced 5->0. Covered 55/55 decode-faithful is BY CONSTRUCTION (constrained decode), not model restraint. entity_resolution=0 ASSERTED not measured.
result.dominant_finding: Organ is a closed 4-attribute / 37-token store; 34/89 domain facts UNSTORABLE (2 attrs no slot, applicant overflow at 11th, patent_number saturates color at 15). Integrity gates pass ONLY on storable subset. Holding a real open domain requires extending the SEALED organ vocabulary (the big bet), out of scope here.
result.corpus: 15 real source-pinned patents (Google Patents URLs); EP25216372.0 absent (HTTP 404, unpublished 2025 EP app); no fabrication
result.adversarial_verification: Independent skeptic agent red-teamed the campaign: UPHELD no-fabricated-facts (cross-checked 4 live incl 1933 NSA patent), wrong_commit=0 falsifiable (corruption injection fires it), value_storage=34/89 arithmetic exact, capacity-bound label honest. CAUGHT initial G_HALLUC overstatement (forced-decode tautology + 2 free-pass abstains) -> fixed with raw-vs-controlled hallucination probe + corrected refusal detector across 3 deterministic re-runs.

step_34_stage_u_neural_arbiter_2026_06_1.campaign: Stage U (Unification) - port honest mechanics onto the NEURAL continuous-value substrate. Autonomous (architectural autonomy granted); rule = respect the vision direction.
step_34_stage_u_neural_arbiter_2026_06_1.open_problem: symbolic wrong_commit=0 comes from EXACT integer value_idx equality; on neural banks 'same value' is a THRESHOLD on 768-dim vectors with a false-match floor. Step 1 MEASURES whether/where wrong_commit=0 survives on continuous values.

crux_decisions.checkpoint: NO trained DCortexV2Model checkpoint exists (only small *_head.pt). Step 1 isolates ARBITER from REPRESENTATION via a controlled value-separability parameter rho; no training needed.
crux_decisions.value_identity: pluggable: PRIMARY cosine-threshold on raw vectors (vision-faithful); SECONDARY discretize-to-prototype (regains exact equality, a discrete code).
crux_decisions.dcortex_edit: editable now but Step 1 keeps it UNTOUCHED; arbiter is a new bank-agnostic module; wires into the model after the mechanism is proven.
crux_decisions.oracle: symbolic organ (Pas7a 10/10) + L1-L5 documented gold (op-sequence + committed value).
crux_decisions.gate: wrong_commit (decoded committed != gold) + op-sequence match; falsifiable (corrupted vector fires it).

step_34_stage_u_neural_arbiter_2026_06_1.honest_scope: Step 1 measures the arbiter mechanism + separability requirement on CONTROLLED value vectors, NOT a trained model's learned values (none exist). The wrong_commit(rho) curve = the target margin training must hit.

result.mechanism: continuous NeuralCommitArbiter reproduces the symbolic organ EXACTLY at rho0/sig0: wrong_commit 0/140, substantive op-set (RETROGRADE/PROMOTE/PRUNE) 100/100, vs LIVE organ oracle (not hand gold). Hand-traced L1/L2/L5.
result.honest_floor: the determinant is the SEPARABILITY MARGIN (min same-value cos - max diff-value cos under noise), NOT cosine-vs-discretize. Calibrated-cosine wrong_commit=0 up to rho<=0.95 (sigma<=0.3); discretize up to rho<=0.99; both track margin>0.
result.falsifiable: True (inject white->commits white vs oracle red; corrupting an L1 challenger breaks promotion - both fire wrong_commit).
result.adversarial_correction: first version overstated a 'cosine floor at rho>0.7'; adversarial verifier showed it was a fixed-theta calibration artifact. Recalibrated theta from observed distributions -> cosine floor moves to rho<=0.95 (=margin). Mechanism + oracle independence + falsifiability all UPHELD by the verifier.
result.scope: CONTROLLED value vectors (no trained DCortexV2Model exists). Gives the margin TARGET training must hit, NOT a claim about a trained representation. Noise caveat: norm-bounded noise benign on the ~1-dim discriminating axis in 768-dim (real high-dim property).
result.implication: the neural substrate CAN host the honest mechanics IF Stage U Step 2 trains/constrains the value representation to keep separability margin>0 (achievable up to ~95% inter-value overlap). Thesis refined: honest property comes from SEPARABILITY, of which discreteness is one guarantor.

step2_observation.decision: B (per owner) - finish the VISION (internalization), not the mechanism milestone (A).
step2_observation.definitive_observation: runs/stage_u/results/organic_geometry.json (well-trained model, top1->1.0): alpha0.9 (lexically-bound value) fully recoverable (linprobe 1.0, cosine +0.388, decode 1.0); alpha0.0 (pure CONTEXTUAL) poor AND WORSENS with training (linprobe 0.56->0.36, decode 0.33->0.17 chance).
step2_observation.finding: the model organically COPIES the answer token (lexical binding), does NOT internalize value from context, and gradient descent moves it FURTHER from internalization - the organic dynamics RESIST internalization. A would give an honest arbiter over PARROTED tokens (vision-empty). Cosine is run-dependent (-0.50/+0.39); the STABLE signal is the linear probe (corrected an earlier overgeneralization).
step2_observation.step_B_spec: docs/STAGE_U_STEP_B_SPEC.md - the DECISIVE experiment: TRAIN with low/annealed lexical_alpha (copy-proof regime) so the model is FORCED to encode value from context. Falsifiable target: linear probe@alpha0 RISES to >=0.80 with top1>=0.80 (ACHIEVED) vs stays <0.50 (REFUTED -> vision needs architecture change, not env shaping). Bounded (1500 steps), pre-declared, run COLD.
step2_observation.harness_ready: scripts/train_stage_u.py now supports --lexical-alpha / --anneal-alpha FROM TO / --measure-alpha; verdict on probe@measure-alpha (INTERNALIZATION_ACHIEVED/PARTIAL/REFUTED). NOT launched (owner: run separately, fresh).
step2_observation.gpu_note: training is batch=1 (memory banks are per-episode stateful, [capacity,dim] not batched) -> ~20% GPU util on RTX 5080, ~50 steps/min. NOT a CPU fallback. True utilization needs a batched-memory model change.

step_B_result.decisive_control: runs/stage_u/results/control_anneal.json (ANNEAL ckpt step1500, alpha annealed 0.5->0.0): decode_true=0.847(>=0.80 bar), decode_vs_shuffled_gold=0.113(chance)=>genuine binding; probe_true=1.0, probe_shuffled_label=0.111(chance)=>probe GENUINE not overfit. STRICT (alpha=0.0 from start) corroborates: decode@0.0=0.980.
step_B_result.finding: Forced COPY-PROOF (low/annealed lexical_alpha), DCortexV2Model GENUINELY INTERNALIZES the value from context: the model's OWN answer-head (decode) reads the value from w_value at 0.85(ANNEAL)/0.98(STRICT) at alpha=0.0, rising from 0 at init, and both probe and decode COLLAPSE to chance under adversarial shuffling. The vision's central premise (think-in-memory, value internalized not token-copied) is REALIZABLE on this substrate at small scale.
step_B_result.corrections_self: (1) Trainer auto-label INTERNALIZATION_PARTIAL is a BUG: it gated on probe-RISE, but the probe was genuine-and-already-high (info linearly present in w_value throughout); the trustworthy decode metric ROSE decisively 0->0.85. Gate must be decode+control, not probe-rise. (2) My earlier suspicion that probe=1.0 was overfitting was DISPROVEN by the shuffled-label control (collapses to chance). (3) Step 2's 'model resists internalization' was at alpha=0.9 (lexical crutch); forced copy-proof it internalizes.
step_B_result.scope: single model, small synthetic regime (15 colors x 30 entities, 3-5 facts/episode), single machine, single domain. NOT a generality claim; realizable AT THIS SCALE.
step_B_result.next: ANNEAL controlled verdict = INTERNALIZATION ACHIEVED is the decisive result. Optional: re-run STRICT to completion for its control (full corroboration). Then wire Step-1 arbiter onto the internalized value (Stage U completion).
step_B_result.strict_status: STRICT process KILLED externally at step 650 (no traceback/error - external termination, likely resource/session limit). It reached decode@0.0=0.980 at step 600 (trajectory CORROBORATES, even stronger than ANNEAL) BUT did NOT complete and saved NO checkpoint, so its adversarial control did NOT run. Corroboration is PARTIAL (trajectory only). The verdict stands on ANNEAL (complete + controlled), which does not depend on STRICT.
step_B_result.heldout_generalization: PASSED: decode@0.0 on UNSEEN entities (cow,pig,...) = 0.933 (>= training-entity 0.847); the model reads value from context, NOT entity-memorization. Internalization GENERALIZES across entities. Strengthens ACHIEVED. Scope: same 15-value vocab/domain/scale; novel values/domains/scale untested. (runs/stage_u/results/control_heldout.json)

step_C_unification.result: Honest-mechanics arbiter (Step 1) run on the trained model's OWN internalized w_value (Step B), end-to-end L1-L5. wrong_commit=0 on L1/L2/L4/L5 (promote/retrograde/no-inflation/prune, trained COLOR values); op-sequence 100/100 vs symbolic oracle (both cosine and model-decode identity). ALL 40/140 errors are L3 (big/forest = size/location, OOD for the color-only-trained model) = internalization-coverage gap, NOT arbiter failure. decode_floor 33% inflated by L3; ~15% on colors.
step_C_unification.meaning: THE VISION'S CORE LOOP CLOSES end-to-end at small scale: model internalizes value from context -> honest mechanics operate on the model's own internalized memory -> wrong_commit=0 in-distribution. Stage U complete at this scale.
step_C_unification.calibration: model w_value mean_same 0.968 / mean_diff 0.077 (colors cleanly separable); margin -0.38 from big/forest OOD outliers only.
step_C_unification.scope: single model, small synthetic regime, single domain. NOT generality. L3 fix = train on size/location too.
step_C_unification.calibration_owner: (1) FRAMING: the claim is per-level wrong_commit=0 on SEPARABLE values + arbiter needs only same/different (mean_diff 0.08), NOT 'wrong_commit <= decode_floor'. wrong_commit=0 on colors coexists with a ~15% exact-decode floor because same/different is exact even when exact-decode is not. (2) SCOPE: U closed the SUBSTRATE loop (honest self-revising memory inside the internalizing model), NOT the THINKING loop. The vision's heart (reason OVER memory) is Stage C, NOT done. 'Stage U complete' != 'vision achieved'.
step_C_unification.next_plan: L3 FIRST as cheap FALSIFICATION of the verdict (train model on size/location too; if L3 wrong_commit drops to ~0 -> confirms unification clean on the WHOLE regime; if not -> the OOD explanation was wrong, real completion problem). THEN Stage C (the differentiating thesis - reasoning over memory). NOT scaling yet.
step_C_unification.L3_falsification: CONFIRMED: multi-attribute training (color+size+location) drops L3 wrong_commit 40/60 -> 0/60; full-regime wrong_commit=0 (140/140), op 100/100, margin -0.38 -> +0.227. The OOD explanation held; the arbiter unifies cleanly on the whole regime once values are trained (=separable). ckpt_multiattr.pt. Substrate loop clean end-to-end; thinking loop (Stage C) is next.

step_35_stage_c_reasoning_2026_06_17.result: runs/stage_c/results/verdict.json (clean run b2r3gwcos): C1 2-hop raw acc 0.894 LOOKS positive but the SHUFFLED control refutes it (C1_shuffled 0.212 - does NOT follow the binding) => SHORTCUT (outputs the single available color), NOT chaining. C2 comparison 0.475 (~chance). Does not abstain on broken chains. C0 1-hop was a candidates() BUG (color answer scored vs entity candidates -> 0.0 artificially; fixed); storage is independently proven (Step B decode 1.0).
step_35_stage_c_reasoning_2026_06_17.interpretation: The model READS memory shallowly (1 lookup) but does NOT OPERATE over it (2-hop chain refuted by shuffled; comparison at chance). Confirms the owner's 'no memory to think in', refined: storage-read yes, multi-step operation no. The thinking mechanism (cognitive-operation layer, vision Stage 5) is UNBUILT, not untrainable.
step_35_stage_c_reasoning_2026_06_17.anti_confab: Raw C1=0.89 was a positive-bias TRAP; the pre-declared shuffled control caught it (the gate is the control, not raw accuracy). Led with the correction.
step_35_stage_c_reasoning_2026_06_17.bugs_fixed: candidates() now uses color tokens for C0+C1 (was entity tokens for C0); verdict logic adds C_REFUTED_SHORTCUT (high acc + shuffled<0.50).
step_35_stage_c_reasoning_2026_06_17.next: build memory tokenization (docs/MEMORY_TOKENIZATION_SPEC.md) - the proven-substrate -> loadable-domain-memory piece; thinking (Stage 5) is the separate frontier to BUILD.

step_36_memory_tokenizer_2026_06_20.verdict: MEMORY_TOKENIZER_PARTIAL - the two NEW properties CONFIRMED (scale + value-identity); exact bijection internalization-limited.
step_36_memory_tokenizer_2026_06_20.G_SCALE: PASS: 200 distinct values -> 200 tokens, 0 collisions, held-out assign 1.0. The sealed organ's 37-token capacity wall (which blocked the patent domain campaign) is REMOVED.
step_36_memory_tokenizer_2026_06_20.G_NO_TEXT_LEAK: PASS 8/8: same value via different entity+template -> same token (handle is on the INTERNALIZED value, not the text - preserves the axis-inversion).
step_36_memory_tokenizer_2026_06_20.G_TOKENIZER_BIJECTION: PARTIAL 0.923 (bar 0.99): distinct-value collisions=0 (values never share a prototype); the 7.7% are same-value vectors drifting to a neighbor prototype on held-out contexts = the model's internalization CONSISTENCY floor (~8% drift, matches unification mean_same 0.968), NOT a codebook limit.
step_36_memory_tokenizer_2026_06_20.fix: the gold-anchored PROTOTYPE codebook is passive; a learned VQ codebook (commitment loss pulling same-value w_value together during the model's training) is the refinement to push bijection >=0.99.
step_36_memory_tokenizer_2026_06_20.implication: arbiter-on-tokens would have ~8% wrong_commit (the same internalization floor as unification), not 0, until internalization consistency improves.
step_36_memory_tokenizer_2026_06_20.meaning: Turns Stage U into a SCALABLE, value-based memory (the two goals achieved); exact same/different is internalization-limited at 92%.

files.stage_u/shared_store.py: SharedMemoryStore + MemoryObject. write_canonical = token DIRECT from KNOWN value (EXACT, no internalization drift, status=committed, provenance=user_canonical, trust=1.0). write_extracted = tokenize(w_value) via MemoryTokenizer (provisional, carries the ~8% Stage-I floor). get/list/edit/dump = inspectable + editable shared store.
files.scripts/certify_shared_store.py: CPU cert (canonical path is model-free). Gates below.
files.docs/V1_SCOPE.md: Honest scope: v1 = exact/auditable/self-revising STORAGE + ADMINISTRATION (more than RAG); NOT reasoning over the domain (Stage C refuted 2-hop). Reasoning = Stage 5. VQ (b) deferred to Stage I.

gates.G_CANONICAL_ROUNDTRIP: PASS - write_canonical(bear,color,red) -> read red, committed, user_canonical, exact token
gates.G_ARBITER_ON_TOKENS_canonical: PASS - wrong_commit 0/140 on L1-L5 via canonical token identity (Stage U holds EXACTLY on canonical, no internalization asterisk)
gates.G_INSPECTABLE: PASS - edit red->blue, re-read exact, dump auditable

step_37_shared_store_canonical_path_2026.scope_revision: v1 NO LONGER claims 'the model reasons over your domain' (Stage C undermined it). v1 = honest scalable store + administration + retrieval + no out-of-memory hallucination. Canonical writes are EXACT; the 92% bijection floor is the EXTRACTION path (Stage I) only.
step_37_shared_store_canonical_path_2026.deferred: VQ codebook (b) -> Stage I (extraction). Stage 5 (operate-on-memory / thinking) untouched.

files.scripts/certify_stage_i_extraction.py: FROZEN base, encoder per-token hidden states at entity position (no answer_token_id, no memory write), linear probes (value_head->frozen codebook, attribute_head->3); multi-entity same-attr distinct-value regime; held-out 10/30 entities; 5 seeds.
files.docs/STAGE_I_RESULT.md: Full result + decomposition + caveats + next steps.

step_38_stage_i_extraction_2026_06_20.meaning: The frozen rep does NOT linearly separate co-occurring per-entity values at the entity position (fails in-sample too -> representational, not generalization). Codebook NOT the bottleneck (tokenizer-isolation 0). Auto-extraction front-end UNSAFE on multi-fact text (~half wrong, ~19% cross-bound). Canonical store untouched/exact. Consistent with Stage C (single-object clean, multi-object separation is the frontier).
step_38_stage_i_extraction_2026_06_20.caveats: linear-probe fail != info absent (could be nonlinear / value-token position / attention readout); base is OOD (single-fact-per-encode training); readout-specific.
step_38_stage_i_extraction_2026_06_20.next_architect_call: MLP/attention-query readout (not-present vs not-linearly-present); or train base on multi-fact text; or restrict auto-extraction to single-fact inputs.

files.scripts/certify_multiobject_readout.py: readout ladder linear/MLP/attention on frozen base, held-out, 5 seeds
files.docs/MULTIOBJECT_STEP1_RESULT.md: full result + confound fix + signature + caveat

step_39_multiobject_step1_readout_ladder.meaning: No modest readout recovers GENERALIZABLE co-occurring binding. MLP fits train perfectly but fails held-out -> generalization gap, not capacity -> no separable-object structure in the frozen rep. Step 2 (base retrain) mandatory.
step_39_multiobject_step1_readout_ladder.next: step 2 train_multiobject (fine-tune a COPY ckpt_multiobject.pt, never overwrite ckpt_multiattr); step 3 re-test Stage I + Stage C + Stage U on the new ckpt.

step_40_multiobject_train_and_retest_202.track: ROOT: multi-object separability (the one road) - steps 2 (train) + 3 (re-test)

files.scripts/train_multiobject.py: fine-tune encoder contextual path + linear heads; saves COPY ckpt_multiobject.pt

step_40_multiobject_train_and_retest_202.hypothesis_verdict: PARTIALLY confirmed: separable-encoder init lifts 2-hop chaining 0.21->0.73 (large, controlled A/B) but does NOT clear the 0.80 gate; comparison stays at chance. One root unblocks chaining substantially, NOT comparison -> related but non-identical facets; decoder operate-on-memory (Stage 5) needed.
step_40_multiobject_train_and_retest_202.caveats: single seed; C1_shuffled volatile 0.59-0.80; warm-start retrains all params; Stage U preserved (no tradeoff).
step_40_multiobject_train_and_retest_202.next_architect_call: multi-seed Stage C warm-start; push step-2 separability to 0.02 margin; build Stage 5 decoder operate-on-memory for comparison/robust chaining.

files.scripts/certify_stage5_comparison.py: explicit operation module over separable object reps; A/B; held-out; 5 seeds

step_41_stage5_comparison_2026_06_20.meaning: Layer 5 reachable for comparison: the missing piece was the OPERATION MODULE (sealed decoder sums slots, cannot compare); an explicit module clears the gate. Separability a modest boost for comparison (not the enabler, unlike chaining).
step_41_stage5_comparison_2026_06_20.next: bank-read operation (over written slots); robust chaining to gate via operation layer; multi-seed.

files.scripts/certify_stage5_operate_memory.py: operation layer reads banks+query only; G_BANK_GROUNDED control; bank-vs-rep; 5 seeds
files.docs/STAGE5_OPERATE_RESULT.md: validity battery + per-facet result + self-caught bug

step_42_stage5_operate_over_memory_2026_.meaning: Axis inversion DEMONSTRATED for comparison: reads persisted banks+query only (no text), exact (1.0), answer FOLLOWS shuffled store (grounded 1.0 = decisive proof), better from banks than input rep (1.0 vs 0.46). Chaining-over-banks is the frontier.
step_42_stage5_operate_over_memory_2026_.self_caught_bug: verdict averaged grounded across facets -> mislabeled REP_ONLY; fixed to per-facet -> PARTIAL.
step_42_stage5_operate_over_memory_2026_.next: make stored value expose a followable pointer for 2-hop chaining over banks; or iterative addressing to recover it.

step_43_stage5b_graph_traversal_2026_06_.track: VISION LAYER 5: graph traversal over persisted memory

pointer-recovery head (aux-supervised) + content-chained read; G_CHAIN_GROUNDED via re-pointing; 5 seeds

step_43_stage5b_graph_traversal_2026_06_.meaning: Operation-layer pointer recovery from the FROZEN relational bank value does NOT achieve generalizable graph traversal (chaining 0.32, grounded 0.25); comparison preserved (1.0). The cheaper coupled fix (recovery-in-operation) is refuted; the encoder relational-WRITING extension (pointer-write fine-tune) is the indicated necessary next step.
step_43_stage5b_graph_traversal_2026_06_.next: extend encoder relational writing (pointer-write fine-tune) so B's slot stores target key recoverably; re-run this cert; optional in-sample recovery probe.

step_44_stage5c_pointer_write_2026_06_20.track: VISION LAYER 5: relational pointer-write / graph traversal

files.scripts/certify_stage5c_pointer_write.py: STEP 0 diagnostic + encoder pointer-write fine-tune + re-test; 5 seeds
files.docs/STAGE5C_POINTER_RESULT.md: negative + the deep value-vs-pointer generalization finding

step_44_stage5c_pointer_write_2026_06_20.deep_finding: VALUE-identity separability generalizes across entities (Step 2 0.92 held-out); RELATIONAL-POINTER address does NOT (in-sample 1.0, held-out 0.50 even after dedicated pointer-write). Architecture operates on per-object VALUES over persisted memory (comparison, Stage 5) but cannot store a GENERALIZABLE relational POINTER -> memory not yet a navigable graph; multi-hop traversal blocked by encoder relational-pointer non-generalization, not the operation. Single-fact + comparison preserved (distill cosine 1.0).
step_44_stage5c_pointer_write_2026_06_20.next: a different relational-addressing mechanism (dedicated relational key space / structural key-copy / address-binding objective), not value separability. Caveat: one pointer-write recipe refuted.

step_45_stage5d_structural_addressing_20.track: VISION LAYER 5: structural relational addressing / graph traversal

files.scripts/certify_stage5d_structural_addre: structural pointer = target content-key copy; traversal by content-addressing; structural-vs-learned A/B; 5 seeds

step_45_stage5d_structural_addressing_20.breakthrough: Multi-hop graph traversal over persisted memory SOLVED. Structural pointer (copy of target content-key) generalizes held-out (1.0) where learned rep (5c) sat at chance (0.45); operation traverses it (chaining 1.0, grounded 0.949). Memory is a navigable graph. Confirms: reuse content-addressing, do not learn a pointer. Comparison + single-fact preserved (frozen encoder).
step_45_stage5d_structural_addressing_20.caveat: abstain on broken pointers 0.667 (weak gate); target identification template-given (addressing mechanism tested, not free-text extraction).
step_45_stage5d_structural_addressing_20.next: strengthen abstain (confidence-gated refusal); free-text target identification (extraction); scale beyond 6 colors / single architecture.

files.scripts/certify_stage5e_honest_traversal: confT-driven detection-based abstain; dual gate; balanced regime; 5 seeds

step_46_stage5e_honest_traversal_2026_06.meaning: wrong_commit=0 (signature honesty) EXTENDED to multi-hop graph traversal. The navigable graph abstains on broken chains (0.858) AND answers when answerable (over-abstain 0.022) - dual gate, anti-collapse. Detection-based on retrieval confidence confT (generalizes held-out). Closes the thinking-in-memory loop HONESTLY at small scale.
step_46_stage5e_honest_traversal_2026_06.boundary: target identification template-given; free-text extraction (build graph from text) = next campaign (Stage I-class); small synthetic, not generality.
step_46_stage5e_honest_traversal_2026_06.next: free-text extraction (identify entities/relations from text -> graph); then scale.
